description: Cosmic Lens Phase 7.6.1 health micro-topic catalog (132 topics). Each topic = (synonyms keyword pool) + (recipe = chart slots to pull) + (rules = rule IDs to evaluate). Matcher fires highest-priority topic whose synonyms hit. Rule engine evaluates listed rules against the recipe slots. Composer dedupes slots across multi-topic matches. Narrator turns findings into Hinglish output. ENGINES UNTOUCHED — this layer READS chart data that engines already produced.

overall_status.description: Overall health picture — kaisi hai sehat in general.

disease_enumeration.description: Will any specific disease occur — bimari ho sakti hai kya.

hospitalization.description: Hospitalization risk — hospital admit hone ki sambhavna.

chronic_issue.description: Long-term / chronic illness — purani bimari, lambi bimari.

immunity.description: Immunity strength — rog pratirodhak shakti, sehat ki neenv.

accident_risk.description: Accident / injury risk — durghatna, chot lagna.

surgery_risk.description: Surgery / operation risk — operation hogi kya, kab.

mental_health.description: Mental health — depression, anxiety, stress, mann ki sthiti.

digestive.description: Digestive / pet / metabolism — pachan, pet ki problem.

heart.description: Heart issues — dil, hriday, chhati ki problem.

eyes.description: Eye problems — aankhon ki samasya, drishti.

joints_bones.description: Joints / bones / arthritis — ghutno, jodon ka dard, hadiyan.

bp_diabetes.description: BP / diabetes / lifestyle disease — sugar, blood pressure.

timing_prognosis.description: When will I get better — kab thik hoga, prognosis timing.

house_lord_placement_query.description: Specific lord placement question — kis house ka lord kahaan baitha hai.

vitality_low.description: Vitality / energy reserves low — ojas, jeevan-shakti kam.

weight_loss_unexplained.description: Unexplained weight loss — vajan gir raha hai.

weight_gain_unexplained.description: Unexplained weight gain / obesity tendency — vajan badh raha.

genetic_disease.description: Genetic / hereditary disease — vanshanugat rog, parivar mein.

autoimmune.description: Auto-immune disease — apni hi body khud par attack.

infection_recurrent.description: Recurrent infection — bar bar infection ho raha.

fever_chronic.description: Recurrent / chronic fever — bukhar baar baar.

allergy_general.description: Allergy — kisi cheez se reaction hota hai.

cancer_risk.description: Cancer / kainsar risk — gambheer rog ki sambhavna.

bp_high.description: High blood pressure — high BP, hypertension.

bp_low.description: Low blood pressure — low BP, kam BP.

anemia.description: Anemia — khoon ki kami, hemoglobin low.

circulation.description: Blood circulation issues — hath pair thande, sun ho jate.

acidity.description: Acidity / gas / heartburn — pet mein jalan, gas.

ibs.description: IBS / chronic loose motion — IBS, dast, bowel disorder.

liver.description: Liver problems — yakrut, fatty liver, hepatitis.

gallbladder.description: Gallbladder problems — pittashay, pathri pitt mein.

bronchitis.description: Bronchitis — khansi bahut hoti hai, balgam.

tb_lungs.description: TB / lungs disease — kshay rog, tapedik, lungs ki bimari.

sinus.description: Sinus — naak band, sinus ki dikkat.

throat_chronic.description: Throat chronic problems — gala kharab, tonsillitis.

voice_problems.description: Voice issues — awaaz baith jaati, hoarse voice.

migraine.description: Migraine — adhasisi, ek taraf ka sirdard.

nerve_weakness.description: Nerve weakness — naadi tantra kamzor, hath-pair sun.

depression.description: Depression — udaasi, mann nahi lagta, gehri hatashaa.

stress_chronic.description: Stress chronic — tension rehti hi rehti hai.

memory_concentration.description: Memory & concentration — bhool jata, dhyaan nahi lagta.

addiction.description: Addiction — sharab, sigaret, drugs chhoot nahi rahi.

bipolar_schizophrenia.description: Severe mental illness — bipolar, schizophrenia risk.

shoulder_pain.description: Shoulder pain — kandhe mein dard, frozen shoulder.

hearing_loss.description: Hearing — kaan kam sunte, sunne mein dikkat.

ear_problems.description: Ear pain / infection — kaan dard, kaan baha.

taste_smell.description: Taste / smell loss — swaad, gandh nahi aati.

dental.description: Dental — daanton ki problem, daant dard.

acne_pimples.description: Acne / pimples — chehre pe daane, mohaase.

eczema_psoriasis.description: Eczema / psoriasis — charm rog, dry patches.

premature_greying.description: Premature greying — baal safed ho rahe.

period_pain.description: Period pain — bahut dard hota periods mein.

fertility_female.description: Fertility female — bachhe nahi ho rahe, garbh dharan.

breast_health.description: Breast health — chhati ki gaanth, lump.

fertility_male.description: Male fertility — santaan sukh, sperm count.

low_sperm_count.description: Low sperm count — sperm count kam.

prostate.description: Prostate — prostate enlargement, peshab mein dikkat.

urinary_infection.description: UTI / urinary infection — peshab mein jalan.

diabetes_type1.description: Diabetes Type 1 — sugar Type 1, insulin dependent.

child_immunity.description: Child immunity — bachhe ki immunity weak.

child_growth.description: Child growth issues — bachha thik vikas nahi.

child_chronic.description: Childhood chronic illness — bachpan ki bimari.

age_related_decline.description: Age related decline — buddhape ki kamzori general.

recovery_speed.description: Recovery speed — kab tak thik hounga, healing rate.

dasha_health_impact.description: Current dasha health impact — kya is dasha mein health weak.

transit_health_impact.description: Transit health impact — gochar ka asar sehat par.

sade_sati_health.description: Sade sati health — sade sati mein health pe asar.

life_expectancy.description: Ayu / longevity — life expectancy, kab tak jiyenge.

lifestyle_disease.description: Lifestyle disease general — modern habits ki bimari.
